title: SI Initiate Session Response
description: Brand agent's response to session initiation

session_id.description: Unique session identifier for subsequent messages

negotiated_capabilities.description: Intersection of brand and host capabilities for this session

session_status.description: Current session lifecycle state. Returned in initiation, message, and termination responses.

session_ttl_seconds.description: Session inactivity timeout in seconds. After this duration without a message, the brand agent may terminate the session. Hosts SHOULD warn users before timeout when possible.
